title: Israel military says will keep operating in south Lebanon

snapshot.title: Israel military says will keep operating in south Lebanon
snapshot.description: JERUSALEM: The Israeli military said on Thursday it will continue operating in southern Lebanon and “remove threats” beyond its so-called security zone, after the US and Iran signed an agreement to end the Middle East war, including in Lebanon. The military published a map of its declared “security zone” — which runs some 10 kilometers (six miles) inside Lebanese territory.
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Israel military says will keep operating in south Lebanon | Arab News
